_meta.status: DRAFT - needs native speaker review before production use

topbar.backTip: Age laga screen te wapas jabi
topbar.noteTip: Joldi study notes likhi rakhibi, pichete AI te copy kori aru bhal pora shikhibi
topbar.reportAria: Bug report koribi na feature suggest koribi
topbar.reportTip: Kunba bug pai naki kunba idea ase? Developer ke seneka report pathai dibi
topbar.helpTip: Ei screen ki kore, kineka use koribo, aru kile ei kaam laga
nav.drawer.revision.label: Revision
nav.drawer.revision.tip: Aaji revision te ki ki due ase, sob ekta printable high-yield digest te, logote apuni laga saved Crib Sheets bo.
nav.drawer.library.label: Library
nav.drawer.library.tip: Team pora curate kora question banks browse aru import koribi.
nav.drawer.bookmarks.label: Bookmarks
nav.drawer.bookmarks.tip: Apuni laga save kora har question, topic hisab te group kori, wapas porhibole na retest koribole ready.
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.label: Mistake Vault
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.sub: Ki galti hoise etu thik koribi
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.tip: Apuni jun question te galti korise, etu rakha thakibo joto tak apuni etu lagatar duibar thik na kore.
nav.drawer.doubts.label: My Doubts
nav.drawer.doubts.sub: Apuni jun point wapas dekhibole flag korise
nav.drawer.doubts.tip: Kunba concept point na question explanation clear nohoi lagi apuni flag korise, etu sob yate solve koribi.
nav.drawer.addq.label: Question add koribi
nav.drawer.addq.tip: Students khan ki question sets practice kore, etu upload aru likhi dibi.
nav.drawer.ikigai.label: Ikigai Compass
nav.drawer.ikigai.tip: Apuni laga jinda 4-circle readiness map. Passion, Profession, Mission aru Vocation apuni practice logote logote badli thake.
nav.drawer.stats.label: Stats
nav.drawer.stats.tip: Accuracy, streak aru progress, topic pora topic bhagi kori dikha.
nav.drawer.leaderboard.label: Leaderboard
nav.drawer.leaderboard.tip: Dekhibi apuni laga hapta dusra aspirant khan logote kineka ase.
nav.drawer.weightage.label: Exam weightage
nav.drawer.weightage.sub: Exam te sob pora besi ki ahe
nav.drawer.weightage.tip: Har subject te kiman marks ase. Marks jun jagate besi, ta te study koribi.
nav.drawer.activityLog.label: History
nav.drawer.activityLog.tip: Apuni laga level-up, streak milestone, mastery moment aru test attempt, notun pora purana timeline te.
nav.drawer.search.label: Search
nav.drawer.search.tip: Ekta search pora practice questions, concept cards, lab values, dosage drills aru FAQs sob bisaribi.
nav.drawer.studyPlan.label: Study plan
nav.drawer.studyPlan.sub: Date, daily goal aru din-pora-din plan
nav.drawer.studyPlan.tip: Apuni laga NORCET date aru daily goal set koribi, aru exam din tak laga apuni nijor din-pora-din plan pabi.
nav.drawer.reference.label: Reference
nav.drawer.reference.tip: Lab values, drug tables aru joldi dekhibole laga clinical numbers.
nav.drawer.premium.label: Premium
nav.drawer.premium.tip: Premium te ki ki pabo etu dekhibi. Test phase te sob free ase.
nav.drawer.studyMethods.label: Study Methods
nav.drawer.studyMethods.tip: Proof-based techniques: active recall, spaced repetition aru ei app kineka bhal pora use koribo.
nav.drawer.faq.label: FAQ
nav.drawer.faq.sub: Amar team pora answer kora questions
nav.drawer.faq.tip: Team pora answer kora common questions, apuni bo nijor question hudibole pare.
nav.drawer.about.label: About
nav.drawer.about.tip: Amar mission, app pora kineka shikhai, aru kun manu ei app bonai ase.
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.label: Feedback pathabi
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.sub: Bug report koribi na feature suggest koribi
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.tip: Kunba bug mila naki kunba idea ase? Developer ke seneka report pathai dibi.
nav.drawer.myReports.label: My feedback
nav.drawer.myReports.sub: Apuni laga report aru admin laga reply
nav.drawer.myReports.tip: Apuni laga age laga reports aru admin laga reply khan.
nav.drawer.settingsTip: Themes, sounds, gestures, reminders, backup aru apuni laga profile.
quiz.empty.bookmarks: Apuni laga kunu bookmark kora question nai etiya tak, practice te kunba bookmark koribi, pichete wapas ahibi.
quiz.empty.reviewDue: Etiya review koribole kiba nai, kali wapas ahibi.
quiz.empty.wrong: Review koribole kunu galti answer nai.
quiz.coinsTip: Accuracy Coins, 'why' bujhi study kora pora paise, khali guess kori nohoi
quiz.timerRemainingTip: Baki time: sob pora sesh second khan te chip pulse kore
quiz.timerElapsedTip: Ei session te kiman time lagise
quiz.whyBonusBody: Apuni mark bo paise aru why bujhibole ruki bo thakise. Etu he asol clinical instinct.
quiz.bookmarkTip: Ei question pichete review koribole Bookmarks te save koribi
quiz.revealedBanner: Solution dikhai dise: etu neutral thakibo, apuni laga accuracy te iyar kunu asor lagibo nai, na bhal phale na kharap phale. Ami etu wapas apuni laga review queue te anibo, tate apuni etu pura bhal pora lock kori lobo pari.
quiz.flagTip: Flag kora questions My Doubts te save hoi, sidebar te bisaribi.
quiz.flagged: Flagged: explanation clear nohoi (unflag koribole tap koribi)
quiz.flagCta: Etiya bo confuse ase? Ei explanation flag koribi
quiz.reportErrorCta: Kiba golti dikhise? Report koribi, sob report ekjon manu pora sai.
quiz.explainedAnotherWay: Aru ekta tarika pora explain kora
home.menuTip: App laga har section, study, progress, tools, learning aru help, sob ekta swipe na tap dur te ase. Home te jun jagate bo left swipe kori khuli pari.
home.todayTip: Apuni laga daily briefing, aaji revision te ki due ase, reminders, notun achievements aru study insights.
home.settingsTip: Account, themes, reminders, notifications, sound, sidebar gestures, backups aru bisi kiba aru.
home.guestTitle: Apuni guest hoi explore kori ase
home.guestBody: Progress save koribole, devices majote sync koribole, aru leaderboard & library unlock koribole sign in koribi.
home.waitlistBody: Waitlist te apuni laga founding-member seat reserve koribi, suru batch khan sob free pabo.
home.streakSavedBody: Kali apuni miss korise: apuni laga grace day pora cover hoi loise. Streak jinda rakhibole aaji bo practice kori lobi.
home.whatsNewOne: "{name}" v{version} te update hoise: dekhibole tap koribi
home.whatsNewMany: {n} banks update hoise: dekhibole tap koribi
home.weakAreaTip: Jun topic te apuni laga accuracy etiya sob pora kom ase. Apuni laga sob weak topics drill koribole tap koribi, jun question galti hoise etu he age te ahibo.
home.syllabusCoverageTip: Pura syllabus laga kiman hisa apuni sabo korise. Topic-hisab te breakdown dekhibole tap koribi, ki suru hoise, ki master hoi loise, aru ki etiya bo baki ase.
home.stats.question: question
home.week.title: Apuni laga hapta · {range}
home.week.keepGoing: Lagi thaki jabi: weekly summary unlock koribole har din olop question koribi.
home.review.confirmTitle: Apuni laga review test suru koribo?
home.review.confirmBodyOne: Spaced revision te 1 question due ase. Har answer te loge-loge feedback pabo.
home.review.confirmBodyMany: Spaced revision te {n} questions due ase. Har answer te loge-loge feedback pabo.
home.exam.setNewDate: Notun date set koribole tap koribi
home.drill.title: Drill Tests
home.drill.tip: Apuni laga sob test modes ekta jagate. Quick, Topic Wise, Mock, Dosage aru Advanced, logote previous-year papers bo.
home.drill.sub: Quick · Topic Wise · Mock · Advanced · Dosage · PYQ
home.learn.title: Topic hisab te shikhibi
home.learn.tip: Concept cards jun har topic shikhai, test dibole age te material shikhi lobi.
home.learn.sub: Concept cards · test age te shikhibi
home.levelUp.title: Level Up
home.levelUp.tip: Apuni laga progression hub, clinical games aru Knowledge Map khela kori XP kamabi, levels uthibi aru prestige tiers unlock koribi.
home.levelUp.sub: Clinical games · Knowledge Map · XP kamabi
home.notif.reviewBodyOne: Aaji spaced revision te 1 question due ase.
home.notif.reviewBodyMany: Aaji spaced revision te {n} questions due ase.
home.notif.streakBody: Apuni lagatar {s} din study korise. Etu he consistency, jun pass hoi aru jun nohoi etu alag kore.
home.notif.exam7: Sesh stretch: apuni laga prep te bharosa rakhibi aru high-yield notes usor te rakhibi.
home.notif.exam14: Aru duita hapta baki. Apuni laga weak areas tight koribi aru revision te jor dibi.
home.notif.exam30: Ekta mahina pora kom baki ase. Etiya steady, focused revision he sob pora bhal kaam koribo.
home.notif.examOneDay: Apuni laga exam te 1 din baki
home.notif.examDays: Apuni laga exam te {n} din baki
home.notif.trendingUpBody: Apuni laga accuracy hapta hapta te {lastAcc}% pora {thisAcc}% te uthi loise. Apuni ki bo badli korise, etu kaam kori ase.
home.notif.sharperBody: Pichila hapta laga tulonate apuni laga {topic} accuracy bisi bhal hoise. Bhal momentum ase.
home.notif.bankUpdatedMany: {n} question banks te notun content ahi loise.
home.reply.fixed: Apuni laga report thik hoi loise: dhanyavad!
home.reply.fixedOn: {id} te apuni laga report thik hoi loise: dhanyavad!
home.reply.one: Ekta admin pora apuni laga feedback te reply korise.
home.reply.many: Admin pora apuni laga {n}ta report te reply korise.
welcome.pitch.title: Apuni laga NORCET edge
welcome.pitch.sub: Sathi second te: etu kile ekta aru PDF pora bhal ase.
welcome.pitch.p1Title: Bisi aspirant PDF te dubi jai
welcome.pitch.p1Body: Sesh nohoa notes, kintu nijor kot khara ase aru ki age te thik koribo lage etu pata nai.
welcome.pitch.p2Title: Ei app prep ke ekta plan diye
welcome.pitch.p2Body: Spaced revision, weak-area targeting, asol exam-style timing aru apuni laga syllabus laga ekta clear map.
welcome.pitch.p3Title: Exam din laga feel dibole bonai
welcome.pitch.p3Body: Negative marking, sectional pacing aru topper benchmarks, tenehole asol CBT chena-jana lagibo.
welcome.lib.title: Library pora suru koribi
welcome.lib.sub: Jitia hoile bo sidebar menu te pabo.
welcome.lib.r1Body: Topic aru source hisab te group kora curated question sets, apuni laga practice pool laga dil.
welcome.lib.r2Title: Jun sets lage etu download koribi
welcome.lib.r2Body: Bank add koribi aru tar questions apuni laga tests, stats aru revision te jur hoi jabo, pichete offline bo kaam koribo.
welcome.lib.r3Body: Custom question sets bonabi (Add question / Library) aru apuni ki lage exactly etu drill koribi.
welcome.demo.genderTrust: AIIMS pora strict 80:20 gender quota lagai. Ami etu khali apuni laga pool te apuni laga simulated leaderboard rank calibrate koribole use kori. Content limit koribole kitia bo nohoi.
welcome.demo.qualTitle: Apuni laga sob pora upor qualification?
welcome.demo.qualTrust: Etu pora ami apuni laga training laga examples frame kori. GNM nurses ke bedside-to-theory drills pabo.
welcome.demo.empTitle: Prep apuni laga din te kineka fit hoi?
welcome.demo.empTrust: Ami apuni laga dashboard adapt kori dibo. Ekta kaam kora nurse Tuesday dupurbela 3-ghonta laga mock dibole na pare.
welcome.demo.windowTitle: Apuni kitia sob pora bhal study kore?
welcome.demo.windowTrust: Ami apuni laga daily nudge etu window te pathai dibo, ekta reminder jun apuni asol te free thaka homoi te ahe etu he kaam kore. Jitia hoile bo badli lobi.
welcome.demo.privacyNote: Optional & private · jitia hoile bo Settings → Profile te badli lobi.
welcome.demo.contentNote: Sob question manu pora likha aru sai luwa ase. Golti dikhile ek tap te report koribi.
welcome.ikigai.title: Apuni laga reason why ki ase?
welcome.ikigai.bodyPost: : etu gaharo reason jun karone apuni Nursing Officer hobole mon kori ase. Ki cheez etu sob worth it bonai?
welcome.ikigai.placeholder: Moi laga ama-baba ke ekta ghor kini dibole. Nijor ke prove koribole. Moi laga community ke seva koribole.
welcome.ikigai.private: Private. Khali apuni he etu dekhibo pari.
welcome.ikigai.return: Apuni laga sob pora tan din khan te, NurseHolic etu apuni ke wapas mone koridibo, apuni nijor kotha te.
welcome.tips.title: Tinita joldi tips
welcome.tips.sub: Sano sano kaam jun app ke apuni laga bonai.
welcome.tips.t1Body: Home screen, menu na settings te, ekta card olop somoi press & hold koribi, na khuli tar quick description dekhibi.
welcome.tips.t2Body: Home screen te jun jagate bo left swipe kori menu khulibi, aru right swipe kori bondh koribi. Phone, tablet aru iPhone te eke pora kaam kore.
welcome.tips.t3Title: Apuni laga favourites ke heart koribi
welcome.tips.t3Body: Kunuba section te heart tap koribi. Stats, ekta drill mode, leaderboard, pin koribole. Pichete apuni laga favourites home screen te ekta tap dur te thakibo.
welcome.tour.title: Bhitor te ki ki ase, dekhibi
welcome.tour.sub: Kunuba section te tap kori dekhibi etu ki kore, pichete suru kori dibi. Ei tour Settings pora aru khuli pari.
welcome.popup.sub: Suru koribole age te ekta joldi jhalak
welcome.leave.title: Tour chari dibo?
welcome.leave.body: Ei tour jitia hoile bo Settings → Show welcome tour pora aru khuli pari.
welcome.rows.kmap.title: Knowledge Map
welcome.rows.kmap.desc: Apuni laga syllabus ekta constellation nisina, practice kori har star jolabi.
welcome.rows.drill.title: Drill Tests
welcome.rows.drill.desc: Sob choita test modes, joldi warm-up pora pura exam simulation tak, ekta jagate.
welcome.rows.learn.title: Topic hisab te shikhibi
welcome.rows.learn.desc: Passive video laga bodli te sano-sano concept cards.
welcome.rows.methods.title: Study Methods
welcome.rows.methods.desc: Study koribole choita science-backed tarika, aru har ekta yate kineka use koribo.
welcome.rows.revision.title: Revision Sheet
welcome.rows.revision.desc: Bookmarks ekta printable page te digest kora.
welcome.rows.doubts.title: My Doubts
welcome.rows.doubts.desc: Shikha homoi te ki bo clear nohoi lage etu flag koribi; sob ekta jagate clear koribi.
welcome.rows.library.title: Question Bank Library
welcome.rows.library.desc: Shared banks browse koribi aru questions import koribi.
auth.createSub: Devices majote progress save koribole ekta profile bonabi
auth.keepExploring: Guest hoi explore kori thaki jabi
auth.googleSignedPre: Google pora sign in hoise as
auth.googleSignedPost: : finish koribole niche ekta display name basi lobi.
auth.recovery.identify: Apuni laga display name likhibi. Ami apuni laga security question dikhai dibo, tenehole apuni prove koribo pare etu apuni he ase.
auth.recovery.dob: Profile bonai thaka homoi te set kora date of birth likhibi, pichete ekta notun password basi lobi.
auth.recovery.question: Apuni laga security question laga answer dibi, pichete ekta notun password basi lobi.
auth.recovery.success: Password reset hoi loise. Notun password pora log in koribi, ami etu age pora he bhorai rakhise.
auth.nameTaken: Ei naam age pora he keu loi loise.
auth.emojiCaution: Emojis aru symbols leaderboard na backups te thik pora dikha nai paribo. Letters, numbers aru spaces sob pora safe ase.
auth.answerHelp: Password pahori jaile etu pora he apuni ke wapas paribole modot koribo. Case-sensitive nohoi.
auth.emailConfirmedGoogle: Apuni laga Google account pora confirm hoise.
auth.emailHelp: Etu pora apuni username na email dutu pora bo log in koribo pari, aru account wapas paboloi bo modot kore.
auth.ph.choosePwd: Ekta password basi lobi (kom pora kom 8 chars)
auth.ph.chooseNewPwd: Ekta notun password basi lobi (kom pora kom 8 chars)
auth.warn.google: Apuni laga Google account ei profile ke secure rakhi ase, alag pora kunu password mone rakhibole nalage.
auth.warn.create: Apuni laga display name aru password mone rakhibi. Log in koribole duita he lagibo. Apuni laga security question he ekmatro rasta jodi apuni etu pahori jai access wapas paboloi.
auth.warn.login: Etu ekta study app ase, kunu secure account nohoi. Kot bo aru use kora password yate dibole nalage.
auth.consentPre: Profile bonai apuni ei sob logote agree kore:
auth.legacy.title: Ei device laga purana progress ei profile te loi anibi
auth.hint.google: Profiles devices majote sync hoi thake. Apuni laga Google account apuni ke sign in rakhe, password nalage.
auth.hint.create: Profiles devices majote sync hoi thake. Apuni laga display name, password aru security answer mone rakhibi.
auth.hint.login: Password pahori loise naki? Upor laga link use koribi. Security question pora reset koribo pari.
auth.link.title: Apuni laga profile pai loise
auth.link.body1: age pora he ei profile te ase
auth.link.body2: Google connect koribole etu profile laga password ekbar likhibi, tar pichete ekta tap te sign in hoi jabo.
auth.err.notStaff: Ei Google account kunu staff account logote link nai. Apuni laga username & password pora sign in koribi, na hoile age te main app pora Google link koribi.
auth.err.linkFailed: Apuni laga Google account link kori napalo
auth.err.noRecoverable: Etu naam logote kunu recoverable profile pai nai. Spelling check koribi, na hoile ekta notun profile bonabi.
auth.err.pickDob: Apuni laga date of birth basi lobi
auth.err.typeAnswer: Apuni laga security question laga answer likhibi
auth.err.profanity: Etu display name te ekta shabda ase jun ami public te dikhai napari, aru ekta basi lobi.
settings.guest.tip: Etiya apuni ekta guest ase, apuni laga progress khali ei device te he thake. Ekta free profile bonai etu backup koribi aru phones majote sync koribi.
settings.guest.sub: Apuni ekta guest ase: progress save koribi & devices majote sync koribi
settings.profile.rowTip: Apuni laga naam badli lobi, ei device te aru ekta profile te switch koribi, apuni laga data backup koribi, na hoile ei profile reset koribi, sob ekta page te.
settings.profile.tapToRename: Rename koribole tap koribi · devices majote sync hoi
settings.profile.loggedIn: Logged in · devices majote sync hoi
settings.profile.syncedBody: Apuni laga progress apuni laga account te save hoi ase. Ekta notun phone na laptop te, khali eke naam & password pora sign in koribi, sob apuni-apuni restore hoi jabo.
settings.switch.confirmBody: Apuni ekta alag profile te jai jabo. Apuni laga etiya laga progress save ase.
settings.logout.confirmTitle: Ei profile pora log out koribo?
settings.logout.confirmBody: Apuni laga progress save ase aru apuni jitia hoile bo wapas log in koribo pari. Kiba bo delete nohoi.
settings.logout.sub: Ei device te session khotom koribi
settings.reset.confirmTitle: Ei profile laga data reset koribo?
settings.reset.confirmBody: Etu khali ei profile laga progress, bookmarks, stats aru custom questions hodai karone delete kori dibo. Dusra profile te asor nai. Etu wapas kori napari, age te ekta backup download kori lobi (Settings → Backup).
settings.reset.rowTitle: Ei profile laga data reset koribi
settings.reset.rowSub: Progress, bookmarks, stats & custom questions hodai karone delete hoi jabo
settings.gestures.intro: Basi lobi sidebar kineka khule aru bondh hoi. Backdrop tap kori bondh kora hodai on he thake.
settings.gestures.closeOn: Sidebar khula thaka homoi jun jagate bo right swipe kori bondh koribi
settings.gestures.closeOff: Off: apuni tebo backdrop na menu icon tap kori bondh koribo pari
settings.gestures.openSub: Home screen te jun jagate bo left swipe kori sidebar khulibi, phone, tablet aru iOS.
settings.gestures.rowSub: Swipe kori sidebar khulibi na bondh koribi
settings.gestures.rowTip: Basi lobi sidebar kineka khule aru bondh hoi, Home te jun jagate bo left swipe kori khulibi, right swipe kori bondh koribi. Backdrop tap koribo hodai bondh hoi.
settings.sync.signInCta: Cloud backup on koribole sign in koribi
settings.sync.backUpNowSub: Apuni laga sob pora notun progress etiya cloud te pathai dibi
settings.sync.msgOk: Etiya he cloud te backup hoi loise.
settings.sync.msgOffline: Etiya cloud tak punchi napalo. Apuni laga progress ei device te safe ase aru online ahile apuni-apuni backup hoi jabo.
settings.sync.msgFailed: Backup hoi para nai, apuni laga connection check kori aru ekbar try koribi.
settings.sync.footer: Backup automatic ase: apuni ki bo kore etu apuni-apuni cloud te save hoi jai, apuni laga Knowledge-Map notes bo. Download koribole na harabole kunu file nai. Notun phone te jaboloi, khali app install koribi aru sign in koribi.
settings.sync.rowSubGuest: Cloud te backup koribole sign in koribi
settings.sync.rowSub: Apuni laga progress apuni-apuni backup hoi thake
settings.sync.rowTip: Apuni laga cloud-backup status dekhibi aru jitia mon jai backup koribi. Apuni laga progress: Knowledge-Map notes logote, apuni-apuni sync hoi aru jun device te bo sign in korile restore hoi jabo. Kunu file download koribole nalage.
settings.share.title: NurseHolic share koribi
settings.share.tip: Apuni laga nijor invite, link, QR aru ekta one-tap WhatsApp message. Jun bondhu iyar pora join kore taikhan apuni laga leaderboard te dikhibo.
settings.share.sub: Apuni laga nijor invite link, QR code & WhatsApp share
settings.spaced.tip: Long-term memory karone spaced repetition he sob pora dangor lever ase. Etu Home te ekta 'Review due' card dikhai jitia kunuba topic ke aru ekbar dekhibole lage.
settings.spaced.title: Spaced revision reminders
settings.spaced.on: Questions review koribole ready hoile Home te sabuj 'Review due' card dikhabi
settings.spaced.off: Hidden: spaced-repetition engine tebo date track kori thake, khali apuni ke nudge nakore
settings.notif.tip: Sob ekta switch te: apuni basi kora time tak study nakorile ekta halka daily nudge, logote notun question sets ahile ekta ping. Duitao niche fine-tune koribi.
settings.notif.iosIntro: iPhone khan khali install kora apps pora he notifications allow kore. Age te install koribi: khali dos second lage:
settings.notif.iosStep2Post: , app khulibi, aru ei switch on koribi
settings.notif.offSub: Ekta tap: daily study nudge + notun questions ahile ekta ping
settings.notif.nudgeTimeSub: Khali tabo baje jitia apuni etu somoi tak study nakore
settings.notif.contentOn: Team pora notun question set add korile ekta ping
settings.notif.contentOff: Off: notun question sets laga kunu ping nai
settings.notif.blocked: Ei app karone notifications blocked ase. On koribole apuni laga browser settings te ei site laga notifications allow koribi, pichete aru ekbar try koribi.
settings.notif.unsupported: Ei browser notifications support nakore. App ke home screen te install kori dekhibi.
settings.install.title: App install koribi
settings.install.sub: Full screen, offline bo kaam kore, home screen pora ekta tap dur
settings.gk.tip: GK aru Aptitude NORCET nursing core laga hisa nohoi, tai karone default te etu apuni laga accuracy aru weak areas pora bahar thake. Khali on koribi jodi apuni etu jani-buji drill kore.
settings.gk.title: GK & Aptitude ke stats te count koribi
settings.gk.on: General Knowledge aru Reasoning & Aptitude apuni laga accuracy, coverage aru weak areas te count hoi
settings.gk.off: Off: khali nursing topics he accuracy, coverage aru weak areas te count hoi (recommended)
settings.sound.title: Pull-to-refresh sound
settings.sound.tip: Pull down kori refresh korile ekta halka confirmation sound. Etu khali dekhibole he: silent refresh lage hoile off kori dibi.
settings.sound.on: Pull down kori refresh korile ekta halka sound baje
settings.themes.title: Themes
settings.themes.tip: Light aru dark majote switch koribi, aru pura app karone ekta accent colour palette basi lobi.
settings.themes.sub: ekta mode aru colour palette basi lobi
settings.help.tourSub: Har mode ki kore etu laga joldi recap
settings.fav.title: Favourites
settings.fav.onLead: On: heart icons pura app te dikha ase.
settings.fav.onEmpty: Kunuba section heart kori apuni laga home screen te pin koribi.
settings.fav.onCountOne: Apuni laga home screen laga uporte 1ta favourite.
settings.fav.onCountMany: Apuni laga home screen laga uporte {n}ta favourites.
settings.fav.off: Off: heart icons sob jagate hidden ase. Etu dikhabole aru apuni laga favourite sections home te pin koribole on koribi.
settings.fav.manageSub: Apuni laga one-stop list te sections add koribi
settings.fav.orderSub: Home te dikha order badli lobi
settings.crib.title: Tests laga pichete Crib Sheet dikhabi
settings.crib.on: Har test laga pichete correct, wrong aru missed questions review koribi
settings.crib.off: Crib Sheet hidden ase, tests laga pichete khali results screen he
settings.crib.footer: Crib Sheet har question ke correct answers aru explanations logote dikhai. PYQ booklet nisina. Etu share bo kori pari.
settings.legal.privacySub: Ami ki store kori aru etu kineka use hoi
settings.legal.guidelinesSub: Ami FAQ threads aru leaderboard ke kineka friendly rakhi
settings.legal.refundsSub: Paid plans kineka kaam koribo (aaji sob free ase)
settings.legal.disclaimerSub: Amar content ki ase, ki nohoi, aru golti khan kineka thik kore
settings.legal.rowTip: Privacy Policy aru Terms of Use porhibi. Ki store hoi, kineka use hoi, aru app laga simple niyom.
settings.legal.rowSub: Privacy Policy aru Terms of Use
settings.support.title: NurseHolic ke free rakhibi
settings.support.sub: Free aru ad-free · server costs te modot koribole moike ekta chai khuwabi
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.rowTip: Buttons, menus aru instructions laga language badli lobi. Questions aru study content English te he thakibo, asol NORCET exam nisina.
settings.language.subtitle: Etu app laga buttons, menus aru instructions laga language badlai. Questions, explanations aru study content jani-buji English te rakha ase: NORCET English te hoi, tai karone apuni exam laga nijor language te he practice kore.
settings.language.storageWarning: Apuni laga device laga storage prai full hoi loise. Jitia tak apuni olop jaga khali nakore, ei language offline available nathakibo pare.
settings.language.downloadFailed: Ei language download kori napalo. Apuni laga connection check kori aru ekbar try koribi.
settings.language.draftNotice: Translations etiya suru laga drafts ase aru feedback pora bhal hoi thake. Jodi kunuba line apuni laga language te galti lage, Report button pora amike koi dibi.
